videos.headline: Marcus Burke hauls in 20-yard Florida TD
videos.description: Marcus Burke catches a 20-yard lob from Graham Mertz for a touchdown taking the lead against Mississippi St.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Marcus Burke hauls in 20-yard Florida TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Graham Mertz connects with Arlis Boardingham for Florida's first TD
videos.description: Graham Mertz completes a 3-yard pass to Arlis Boardingham for a touchdown putting Florida on the board against Mississippi.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Graham Mertz connects with Arlis Boardingham for Florida's first TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaac Smith forces fumble to regain possession for Mississippi State
videos.description: Isaac Smith delivers a defensive play forcing a Florida fumble and giving Mississippi State possession.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Isaac Smith forces fumble to regain possession for Mississippi State) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davon Booth powers in for 1-yard TD run for Mississippi State
videos.description: Davon Booth muscles his way into the end zone with a 1-yard run putting Mississippi State on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Davon Booth powers in for 1-yard TD run for Mississippi State) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hayden Hansen makes catch for 35-yard receiving touchdown
videos.description: Hayden Hansen makes catch for 35-yard receiving touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hayden Hansen makes catch for 35-yard receiving touchdown) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Seydou Traore shows off crazy hands and hops on wild hurdle catch
videos.description: Seydou Traore hurdles over a defender and fumbles the ball midair, but somehow recovers it for an unbelievable play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Seydou Traore shows off crazy hands and hops on wild hurdle catch) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Mosley 'Mosses' defender for 13-yard Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Jordan Mosley goes up over the defender to haul in a 13-yard touchdown pass, bringing his team within one score against Florida.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Mosley 'Mosses' defender for 13-yard Mississippi State TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Graham Mertz sneaks in with the tush push for 1-yard TD
